# The Funky Truckeria

> Award-winning artisanal tacos with worldly influences and a Southern California flair: Korean BBQ, Thai, Huli Huli, Baja fish and more, built fresh to order at a hidden-gem taqueria in Norton, Ohio.

## Business facts
- Business: The Funky Truckeria
- Location: Norton, OH
- Phone: (330) 208-0560
- Email: thefunkytruckeria@gmail.com
- Service area: Norton, OH, Barberton, OH, Wadsworth, OH, Akron, OH, Summit County, OH
- Rating: 4.6 stars (187 reviews)
- Hours: Monday, Tuesday, Wednesday, Thursday: 11:00-20:00 | Friday, Saturday: 11:00-21:00

## Key pages
- https://thefunkytruckeria.com/
- https://thefunkytruckeria.com/menu/

- https://thefunkytruckeria.com/accessibility/

## Common questions
- What are The Funky Truckeria’s hours? We’re open Monday through Thursday 11am-8pm, Friday and Saturday 11am-9pm, and closed Sunday.
- Where is The Funky Truckeria located? We’re at 3200 Greenwich Rd, Suite 113, Norton, OH 44203, in Norton Plaza. There’s a spacious lot right out front.
- Do you do carry-out and online ordering? Yes. Order online through our Heartland ordering page or the Heartland app, or call us at (330) 208-0560 for carry-out.
- Do you cater events and book the food truck? We do. Our food trucks cater weddings, corporate events, festivals and private parties across Northeast Ohio. Call (330) 208-0560 to book.
- Do you have vegetarian options? Yes. Our crispy fried zucchini and buffalo cauliflower tacos are vegetarian, along with guacamole, salsa and street-corn sides.

## Contact
Call (330) 208-0560 or email thefunkytruckeria@gmail.com for more information.
